_comment: AOT ours(v10 fp8-WMMA)-vs-stock-Triton crossover for gfx1201 (RX 9070 XT). Key 'N,K,group' -> smallest token-count M at/above which v10 beats stock Triton W4A16 for the ENTIRE M>=value suffix (2% noise margin); null/absent = never (always Triton). v10's mid-M crossover is non-monotonic + shape-dependent, so this is the safe winning-suffix start: the served pathway never drops below stock. Regenerate per GPU with profile_crossover.py. Unknown shapes -> Triton.
